_comment: Plugin configuration file - JSON format. Read/write with LoxBerry::JSON (Perl) or lbfromjson/lbtojson (PHP).
_comment_replacements: The placeholder REPLACELBPPLUGINDIR is replaced by the installer with the actual plugin folder name. Other available placeholders: REPLACELBPCGIDIR, REPLACELBPHTMLDIR, REPLACELBPTEMPLATEDIR, REPLACELBPDATADIR, REPLACELBPCONFIGDIR, REPLACELBPLOGDIR, REPLACELBPBINDIR, REPLACELBPSBINDIR.

Section1.Name: This is a Name from the first Section

Section2.Name: This is a Name from the second Section

Section3.Name: This is a Name from the third Section
